# Creeadores

> Creeadores is a marketplace platform that connects brands and agencies with UGC (User-Generated Content) creators and influencers across Latin America.

## Translations
- [Español](https://creeadores.com/llms-es.txt)
- [Português](https://creeadores.com/llms-pt.txt)

## About

Creeadores helps brands find, hire, and manage content creators in one platform. It simplifies the entire workflow: campaign creation, creator discovery, content approval, and secure payments via Mercado Pago.

- Website: https://creeadores.com
- App: https://app.creeadores.com
- Contact: contacto@creeadores.com
- Languages: Spanish, English, Portuguese

## Pages

- [Home – For Brands](https://creeadores.com/): Landing page for brands and agencies looking to hire content creators.
- [Home – For Creators](https://creeadores.com/creator): Landing page for creators and influencers who want to join the marketplace.
- [App](https://app.creeadores.com/): The main application where users manage campaigns, creators, and payments.

## Campaign Types

- **Flex Campaign** (Free): Brands post a brief and negotiate directly with creators. No upfront cost.
- **Influencer Campaign**: Brands hire influencers to publish branded content on their own social media profiles.
- **UGC Creator Campaign**: Brands hire creators to produce professional video content (ads, testimonials, reviews, etc.).
- **UGC + Influencer Campaign**: A hybrid option combining UGC production with influencer distribution. Most complete offering.

## Pricing

- **Free Plan**: $0/month — Up to 2 creators per campaign, 10% commission per transaction.
- **Starter**: US$16/month (or $24,990 ARS) — Up to 10 creators, 5% commission, priority support.
- **Growth** (Most Popular): US$29/month (or $44,990 ARS) — Up to 30 creators, 3% commission, advanced analytics.
- **Scale / Enterprise**: Custom pricing — Unlimited creators, dedicated account manager, custom integrations.

## Key Features

- **Creator Marketplace**: Search and filter creators by niche, location, audience size, and content style.
- **Campaign Management**: Create, manage, and track campaigns from a single dashboard.
- **Protected Payments**: Secure transactions via Mercado Pago. Funds are released only after content approval.
- **Reputation System**: Creators earn Bronze, Silver, or Gold badges based on performance and reliability.
- **Multi-language**: Full platform available in Spanish, English, and Portuguese.
- **Analytics Dashboard**: Track campaign performance, ROI, and creator metrics.

## Regions Served

Argentina, Mexico, Chile, Colombia, Venezuela, and expanding across Latin America.

## Social Media

- Instagram: https://instagram.com/creeadores
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/creeadores
- TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@creeadores

## FAQ

### What is Creeadores?
Creeadores is a marketplace platform that connects brands and agencies with UGC content creators and influencers in Latin America. It provides tools for campaign management, creator discovery, and secure payments.

### How much does Creeadores cost?
Creeadores offers a Free plan ($0/month with 2 creators max), Starter ($16 USD/month), Growth ($29 USD/month, most popular), and Enterprise (custom pricing). All plans include access to the creator marketplace.

### What types of campaigns can I create?
You can create Flex campaigns (free, direct negotiation), Influencer campaigns (branded content on influencer profiles), UGC Creator campaigns (professional video production), and UGC + Influencer hybrid campaigns.

### How do payments work?
Payments are processed securely through Mercado Pago. Funds are held in escrow and released to creators only after the brand approves the delivered content.

### What countries does Creeadores operate in?
Creeadores operates across Latin America, with a strong presence in Argentina, Mexico, Chile, Colombia, and Venezuela. The platform is expanding to more countries.

### What languages does Creeadores support?
The platform is available in Spanish, English, and Portuguese.
